_description: Single-stop corpus shape for paper-3 reproducibility. Derived from analysis/slices.parquet on the slice-bearing subset of the 347-repo cukereuse corpus.
owner_definition: segment before the first underscore in repo_slug; equivalent to the top-level GitHub account-owner namespace, which can be either an Organisation account or a User account (a mix of both is present in the corpus)

filtering_chain.step: after cluster-id filter (Phase 1, drops scenarios <2 clustered steps)
